key.name: oauth-use-custom-redirect
key.summary: Use a custom OAuth redirect URI
key.description: When false, the extension always uses http://127.0.0.1:8080 for the Spotify login callback. Turn on only if you need a different loopback URL.

key.name: oauth-redirect-uri
key.description: Used only when oauth-use-custom-redirect is true. Must match a Redirect URI in your Spotify app exactly. HTTP loopback only (not https).

key.name: show-action-notifications
key.summary: Notify when playing or queuing from search
key.description: Show a system notification after you start playback or successfully add a track to the queue from overview search. Error messages are always shown.
